response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ year experience bar with 15+ years across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure work. Recent Optilyz role is a direct stack match (TypeScript, React, AWS, MongoDB), and current re:cinq role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP — a hard-to-find requirement. Engineering craft signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, workshops, OSS) are strong. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience, but these are learnable given the demonstrated language breadth.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP experience matching a key required skill
Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS production experience at Optilyz
Deep software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, public workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is dated (robotic arms, ~2016-2018)
Vitest not explicitly cited, though testing expertise is well-evidenced via other frameworks
